summary: Modularize the CLI and add schema migrations plus a stable agent adapter protocol
description: Modularize the CLI and add schema migrations plus a stable agent adapter protocol
acceptance: Core version, migration, and adapter protocol logic lives in importable focused modules while cli/go.py remains compatible

Hermes, Codex, and custom adapters consume and emit one documented versioned JSON protocol
